name: css-cosmos
description: Pure-CSS art benchmark: no JS, no images — each model paints an animated cosmic scene with HTML + CSS only.
systemPrompt: You are a CSS art virtuoso. Output a SINGLE self-contained HTML document using ONLY HTML and CSS — absolutely no JavaScript, no external images, no libraries. The scene must fill the viewport (100vw x 100vh) and animate purely with CSS. Return ONLY the HTML document.
prompt: Paint an animated cosmic scene with pure CSS: a deep-space aurora or a glowing planet rising over a horizon, with twinkling stars, soft gradient nebulae, and gentle continuous motion (drifting glow, shimmering stars, slow orbit). Dreamy, premium, dark. Show off what CSS alone can do.
